description: The power to endure, act, and overcome, whether physical, mental, or spiritual. Strength encompasses inner fortitude, the ability to bear weight gracefully, power used wisely, resilience in adversity.
rationale: The word 'thie' combines thoughtful 'thi' with essential 'e', creating vowel hiatus with fricative digraph. This deliberate-to-essence structure captures strength as mindful power expressing true nature.
